LanguageData.ELIFUH-1YVAttack.label: UH-1Y Venom (Attack)
LanguageData.ELIFUH-1YVAttack.description: DESCRIPTION: This UH-1Y with attached rocket pods is a helicopter designed for medium range attack runs, sacrificing storage, passenger and fuel capacity to maintain the same speed of its counterpart. BASIC STATS: Health: 800 LOGISTICS POTENTIAL: Cargo Capacity: 600kg Speed: 5.5 Passenger Capacity: 1-3 Fuel Per Tile: 7 Fuel Capacity: 420 Round Trip Range: 30 Full Range: 60 Internal Power: 400w ATTACK POTENTIAL: Bombing Run Capacity: 3 Precision Run Capacity: 2 Spread: 6 Distance between drops: 4
